issues.detail: Skill does not cover error scenarios or edge cases, focusing only on happy path.

scenarios.name: Express API OpenTelemetry instrumentation
scenarios.rationale: Treatment installs @opentelemetry/sdk-node plus auto-instrumentations-node and the OTLP HTTP trace/metric exporters, creates src/instrumentation.ts loaded via `node --require` before app imports, wires OTLPTraceExporter and PeriodicExportingMetricReader to OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_ENDPOINT, and adds a pino mixin that injects trace_id/span_id from getActiveSpan — all directly from the skill; baseline reaches for older opentelemetry/node packages and skips the --require ordering and pino trace correlation.

scenarios.name: Docker Compose LGTM stack with collector
scenarios.rationale: Treatment delivers compose services for otel-collector (otel/opentelemetry-collector-contrib with ports 4317/4318), tempo, loki, mimir, and grafana with the anonymous Admin role, and supplies a collector config with otlp receivers, memory_limiter + batch processors, and otlphttp/tempo, prometheusremotewrite to mimir, and loki exporters wired through pipelines; baseline produces a generic Prometheus+Grafana+Jaeger compose that omits Tempo/Mimir/Loki and the memory_limiter processor.
